query:
INSERT INTO product_metadata (
    productId,
    invoiceNumber,
    thriftStoreName,
    styleDescription,
    materialDescription,
    customInformation,
    image3Url,
    image4Url,
    image1Alt,
    image2Alt,
    image3Alt,
    image4Alt,
    createdAt,
    updatedAt
) VALUES (
    1,
    'INV-2026-001',
    'Salvation Army Auckland',
    'Classic vintage denim with authentic worn-in look and original hardware',
    '100% cotton heavyweight denim with reinforced stitching',
    'Sourced from premium donation batch - excellent condition',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'Front view showing full garment silhouette',
    'Close-up of stitching and fabric texture',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);

INSERT INTO product_metadata (
    productId,
    invoiceNumber,
    thriftStoreName,
    styleDescription,
    materialDescription,
    customInformation,
    image3Url,
    image4Url,
    image1Alt,
    image2Alt,
    image3Alt,
    image4Alt,
    createdAt,
    updatedAt
) VALUES (
    2,
    'INV-2026-002',
    'Red Cross Wellington',
    'Contemporary streetwear style with bold graphic elements',
    'Premium cotton blend with moisture-wicking properties',
    'Limited edition piece from designer collaboration',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'Full body shot on neutral background',
    'Detail shot of print quality and fabric weave',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);

    NULL,
    NULL,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
);
